forum.not_configured: Set a target date in the admin panel.

settings.title_help: Optional. Shown above the countdown. Leave blank for no header.
settings.icon_help: FontAwesome class shown next to the title (e.g. fas fa-rocket, fas fa-bullhorn, fas fa-calendar). Leave blank for no icon.
settings.target_help: Pick the moment the countdown counts down to. The browser's date picker shows year, month, day, hour, and minute. The timezone setting below tells the widget which zone this time is in.
settings.timezone_help: IANA timezone name (e.g. UTC, America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo). Every visitor's browser counts down to the same actual instant regardless of where they are.
settings.done_message_help: What to display once the countdown hits zero. Defaults to a party emoji if blank.
settings.link_url_help: Optional. If set, the countdown boxes (and the done message) become a clickable link to this URL.
